name: Obsidian
description: The private and flexible writing app that adapts to the way you think
compose:
name: slashnode-obsidian
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/obsidian:1.8.10
    container_name: obsidian
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3435:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-obsidian_server_data-config
